latin: Auriga velocissimus, qui semper vincere solebat, ante cenam familiae suae oravit: 'gratias tibi ago, Iesu infans parvule, in tua praesepi iacens.' uxor eum correxit: 'Iesus non semper infans erat.'

questions.prompt: What unusual thing does the racer do during grace?
questions.target: He prays specifically to baby Jesus
choices: He prays specifically to baby Jesus

questions.prompt: What does his wife point out?
questions.target: Jesus was not always a baby
choices: Jesus was not always a baby

translation: A very fast racer, who always used to win, prayed before dinner with his family: 'Thank you, little baby Jesus, lying in your manger.' His wife corrected him: 'Jesus was not always a baby.'
